description: Contract of hire/rent. Fragment (upper right piece). Lessee: al-sharīf Muslim b. Muḥammad b. Yaḥyā b. Ṭabāṭabā al-[...]. He rents a number of shares in a property (1 + 1/2 + 1/10?). Mentions upper egypt (Ṣaʿīd Miṣr). Needs further examination. Reused on verso for Hebrew jottings.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
